title: A small shop I visit every week
summary: Describe a small shop you visit weekly, the owner, and what you buy.
topic: A small shop I visit every week
prompt: Write 6–8 short sentences about a small local shop you visit every week. Use present simple and adverbs of frequency.
hintStarters: There is a small shop near…
sampleText: There is a small grocery shop on my street in Athens. It is called 'Maria's Corner', and I visit it every Saturday morning. The shop is small, but it has many things. There are wooden shelves on the right side with bread, olive oil, and pasta. There are fresh vegetables in green boxes by the door. The owner is Maria, a kind woman from a small island. Her son George helps her on weekends, and he always smiles at the customers. I usually buy fresh bread, two tomatoes, one lemon, and a small jar of honey. The honey is from Maria's brother in the village, and it is very good. The shop is not very cheap, but the food is fresh. Maria always gives me one free olive when I pay. I sometimes stay for ten minutes and talk about the weather. I am a regular customer now. I like this small shop because it feels like part of my family. A small neighborhood shop makes the week feel warmer.

sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: một quả ô liu miễn phí

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Present simple for weekly habits
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Dùng hiện tại đơn cho thói quen lặp lại hằng tuần: 'I visit it every Saturday'.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: Use the present simple for weekly habits, like 'I visit it every Saturday morning'.

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Adverbs of frequency
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: Place 'usually', 'always', and 'sometimes' before the main verb, as in 'I usually buy fresh bread'.

sampleTranslationVi: Có một tiệm tạp hóa nhỏ trên đường nhà tôi ở Athens. Nó tên là 'Góc của Maria' và tôi ghé mỗi sáng thứ Bảy. Tiệm nhỏ nhưng có nhiều thứ. Có những kệ gỗ bên phải đựng bánh mì, dầu ô liu và mì ống. Có rau tươi trong những thùng xanh đặt cạnh cửa. Chủ tiệm là Maria, một phụ nữ tốt bụng đến từ một hòn đảo nhỏ. Con trai bà tên George phụ vào cuối tuần và luôn cười với khách. Tôi thường mua bánh mì tươi, hai quả cà chua, một quả chanh và một hũ mật ong nhỏ. Mật ong là của anh trai Maria từ làng quê, rất ngon. Tiệm không quá rẻ, nhưng đồ rất tươi. Maria luôn cho tôi một quả ô liu miễn phí khi thanh toán. Tôi đôi khi ở lại mười phút và nói chuyện về thời tiết. Bây giờ tôi đã là khách quen. Tôi thích tiệm nhỏ này vì nó cảm giác như một phần gia đình. Một tiệm nhỏ trong khu phố làm cả tuần ấm hơn.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which sentence uses present simple correctly?
options: I visit the shop every Saturday.
I visiting the shop every Saturday.
I to visit shop Saturday.
I am visit shop every Saturday.
mcQuestions.explanation: Present simple for a weekly habit.

I usually buy fresh bread and two tomatoes.
Buy I usually bread fresh.
Tomatoes I two bread buy fresh.
Usually I fresh two buy bread tomatoes.
I like this shop because the food is fresh.

mcQuestions.hint: Look for a full clause after 'because'.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which word fits: 'The shop is small, ___ it has many things.'
options: but
because
and so so
to

mcQuestions.prompt: Which sentence best fits 'a small shop'?
options: The owner is a kind woman from a small island.
The chef cooks in a five-star hotel.
The mayor signs a big contract.
The pilot lands in a snowstorm.
mcQuestions.explanation: An owner fits a small shop.

options: There is a wooden shelf on the right side.
There is wooden shelf the on side right.
There a wooden shelf is.
Wooden shelf there a side right.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which adverb of frequency fits: 'I ___ stay for ten minutes and talk.'
options: sometimes
loudly
tomorrow
very
mcQuestions.hint: Only one is a frequency word.

options: Maria smiles, and her son helps the customers.
Smiles and helps Maria customers son.

criticalThinkingQuestion: Why do many people prefer a small neighborhood shop over a large supermarket, even when the supermarket is cheaper?
